details: The package vaparklink@1.0.0 is a heavily obfuscated npm package that claims to auto-connect Discord bots to free Lavalink audio nodes. All source code is obfuscated using javascript-obfuscator, preventing static verification of its runtime behavior. The package has no lifecycle hooks and no observable token-theft or credential-exfiltration code in static analysis, but the obfuscation could conceal runtime-only malicious payloads. The package has no repository with verifiable content.
